selectionRule: Choose one highest-value item supported by live evidence; never bundle unrelated items.

items.title: Establish verified Cloudflare baseline
acceptance: record real Cloudflare URL and HTTP status

items.title: Replace linear camera descent with authored camera rail
items.expectedGain: major improvement to spatial storytelling and transitions
acceptance: distinct camera position and look target per scene

items.title: Create distinct procedural world identities
items.expectedGain: reduces repeated-cluster appearance and improves project differentiation
acceptance: at least three visibly distinct procedural systems

items.title: Add cinematic loading and failure recovery
acceptance: honest initialization progress or staged reveal
no content trap for reduced motion or mobile

items.title: Implement measured adaptive quality
acceptance: bounded pixel ratio and effects tiers
no critical visual regression on desktop
